question: Will all of these New England comic con events be held during 2026?
resolution_criteria:
This question will resolve as Yes if all of the following events are held during 2026:

* Rhode Island Comic Con (RICC)
* FAN EXPO Boston
* Rhode Island Anime Con (RIAC)
background:
[Rhode Island Comic Con](https://www.ricomiccon.com) (RICC) is a three-day comic convention held during November at the [Rhode Island Convention Center](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rhode_Island_Convention_Center "Rhode Island Convention Center"), [Amica Mutual Pavilion](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amica_Mutual_Pavilion "Amica Mutual Pavilion"), and [Omni Providence Hotel](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Omni_Providence_Hotel "Omni Providence Hotel") in [Providence, Rhode Island](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Providence,_Rhode_Island "Providence, Rhode Island"). The convention typically offers artists, celebrity guests, cars, comic book authors, a costume contest, gaming, kids-con, professional wrestlers, vendors, video game tournaments, and voice artists. It is scheduled to take place from November 6 to 8, 2026.

[FAN EXPO Boston](https://fanexpohq.com/fanexpoboston/) is a large playground for all fans of comics, sci-fi, horror, anime, and gaming that attracts hundreds of thousands of people in Boston. Every year, FAN EXPO Boston offers exciting family-friendly attractions, events, and world-renowned Celebrities. It is is scheduled to take place from August 7 to 9, 2026.

[Rhode Island Anime Con](https://www.rianimecon.com) (RIAC) is a two-day comic convention held during June at the [Rhode Island Convention Center](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rhode_Island_Convention_Center "Rhode Island Convention Center"), [Amica Mutual Pavilion](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amica_Mutual_Pavilion "Amica Mutual Pavilion"), and [Omni Providence Hotel](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Omni_Providence_Hotel "Omni Providence Hotel") in [Providence, Rhode Island](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Providence,_Rhode_Island "Providence, Rhode Island"). It is is scheduled to take place from June 6 to 7, 2026.

There are concerns Comic Con events may be facing significant issues:

* [RI Comic Con concerned about traffic, travel restriction](https://www.wpri.com/news/local-news/providence/rhode-island-comic-con-really-concerned-about-travel-restrictions/amp/)
* [Why Hollywood is pulling back from Comic-Con](https://san.com/cc/why-hollywood-is-pulling-back-from-comic-con/)
* [Can San Diego Comic-Con 2025 Escape Uncertain Times?](https://www.publishersweekly.com/pw/by-topic/industry-news/trade-shows-events/article/98070-can-san-diego-comic-con-2025-escape-uncertain-times.html)
